{{Infobox character
| name = Jai Chen
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Striker technique]], pink dragon's breath, net of pink madra}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Truegold]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai clan]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Desolate Wilds]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]]
}}

''See also: [[Jai Chen Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Jai]] Chen is a member of the [[Jai]] family and the sister of [[Jai Long]]. A small, pale woman with long black hair, she has been known to wear powder-blue robes or the blue and burnt orange attire of the [[Twin Star sect]]. She is a [[Truegold]] practitioner whose unique [[Path]] involves a combination of [[Hollow King]], Grasping Sky, and [[Stellar Spear madra]], which she manages through the use of a hunger artifact. Her power is manifested through a small, pink-tinged white [[dragon]] spirit named [[Fingerling]]. Throughout her journey, [[Jai]] Chen has faced significant challenges, including being imprisoned by the Patriarch and struggling with the physical strain of controlling her [[madra]]. She has demonstrated resolve in seeking safety through legends and has worked to advance her abilities, eventually hunting [[Remnants]] and [[sacred beasts]] throughout [[Sacred Valley]]. While her brother has noted that she is not a traditional fighter, she has become a motivated practitioner, aided by equipment such as a hunger spear gifted to her by [[Lindon]].}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai]] Chen is the shy and stubborn sister of [[Jai Long]]. During a confrontation with [[Lindon]], she attempted to stab him with a knife, though the blade failed to draw blood upon impact. Her [[life]] was further complicated when a [[Remnant]] began feeding upon her spirit, an attack that was only halted when her brother killed the creature mid-feed. Following this event, it was revealed that her living, serpentine [[madra]] had previously fought against her. To recover from the ordeal, she requires an expensive elixir to repair her core and channels.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen]] is mentioned by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen]] is [[Jai Long]]'s sister.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen]] has always been shy and stubborn.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen]] attempted to stab [[Lindon]] with a knife, but the blade was bloodless when it hit his chest.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen's spirit]] was fed upon by a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen]]'s brother killed the [[Remnant]] halfway through feeding.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen]] needs an expensive elixir to repair her channels and core.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen]]'s [[madra]] is described as serpentine.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen]]'s [[madra]] is alive.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen]]'s [[madra]] used to fight her.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] met [[Jai Chen]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A member of the [[Jai clan]], [[Jai]] Chen was observed concentrating intently on a space between her hands. Her core became swollen with power due to the unstable [[madra]] of [[Jai Daishou]], leaving her lavender [[sacred artist]]'s robes stained with red liquid [[madra]]. During this process, she manifested a pink-tinged serpentine [[dragon]] and must now work to become familiar with her new spirit.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Chen]] is a member of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Chen]] was concentrating on a space between her hands.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5">''Skysworn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Chen]]'s core was swollen with powers from [[Jai Daishou]]'s unstable [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Chen]] wears lavender [[sacred artist]]'s robes stained with red liquid [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Chen]] manifested a pink-tinged serpentine [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Chen]] needs to become familiar with her new spirit.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A small woman who previously fought alongside [[Kelsa]], [[Jai]] Chen has spent many years surviving in the [[Desolate Wilds]]. While accompanied by a [[dragon]] that flies in aimless loops, she scanned [[Lindon]] upon his approach. Although she was not present on the cloudship, she directed [[Fingerling]] and used a dagger to assist [[Jai Long]] in maintaining a defensive circle. Her guidance proved essential in gathering the various groups, leading [[Mercy]] to plan for her to take charge once time unfroze. Ultimately, she led a procession consisting of several hundred [[sacred artists]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]] is a small woman who fought alongside [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]] has a [[dragon]] that flies in aimless loops.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]] scanned [[Lindon]] when he approached.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]] was not present on the cloudship.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]] directs [[Fingerling]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]] assists [[Jai Long]] in maintaining a defensive circle.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]] uses a dagger.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]]'s guidance helped gather the groups.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] plans to put [[Jai Chen]] in charge when time unfrozes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]] led a procession of several hundred [[sacred artists]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]] has spent years in the [[Desolate Wilds]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Chen]] uses his techniques with his contracted spirit as a medium.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Chen]] is a character who was catching her breath on her knees.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|While fighting within the Serpent’s Grave in the [[Twin Star Sect]] territory, [[Jai]] Chen became the target of a strike from [[Jai Long]]. During the confrontation, she unleashed a [[Striker technique]] alongside a [[dragon]] and utilized her ability to launch nets of pink [[madra]] from her hands. She also employed the breath of a pink [[dragon]], while [[Kelsa]] moved to protect her. Following the battle, [[Jai]] Chen was seen sitting upon a rock holding a blue spear in a state of grief.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Chen]] is a target of [[Jai Long]]'s strike.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Chen]] unleashes a [[Striker technique]] with her and the [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Kelsa]] protects [[Jai Chen]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Chen]] can launch a net of pink [[madra]] from her hands.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Chen]] can use pink [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Chen]] was fighting in the [[Twin Star Sect]] territory in Serpent’s Grave.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Chen]] is sitting on a rock and holding a blue spear.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Chen]] is grieving.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Jai Chen]] wore an outer robe of pale blue and burnt orange with the [[Twin Star]] logo.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Jai Chen]]'s [[Path]] is a blend of [[Stellar Spear]], Grasping Sky, and [[Hollow King]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] gave [[Jai Chen]] everything [[Kelsa]] wanted.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Jai Chen]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“Channels…core, need…repaired. Expensive…elixir. Then…pure madra…for core.”<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“This might be a rude question, but is your madra alive?”<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“It was a pleasure to meet you, Jai Chen,” Lindon said, without turning around.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“I scanned him when he walked up. I don’t think he’s going to attack us.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Jai Chen steadied her feet and stretched out both hands. “Fingerling!” She and the dragon unleashed a basic Striker technique: a stream of madra that resembled Lindon’s dragon’s breath.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
